title: Disaggregated data
summary: This ECB webpage is a publication calendar listing reference dates and publication dates for disaggregated data on ECB and National Central Bank contributions to the Eurosystem consolidated financial statement. The page contains no actual data, analysis, or market-relevant content—it is exclusively a schedule of historical and upcoming release dates from 2016 to 2027 with download links. No substantive macro or market structure information is present in this source.
key_points: The ECB publishes monthly disaggregated financial statement data showing ECB and NCB contributions to the Eurosystem
Publication dates are typically 1-5 business days after the reference date
Data series spans from January 2016 through January 2027
Downloads are available in English only
The page is a container/listing page with no actual data content
Source URL is not provided in metadata
why_it_matters: This page is a calendar index for ECB financial data releases. It does not itself contain any macro catalyst information or market structure data. The underlying disaggregated data, once downloaded, may be relevant for analyzing Eurosystem balance sheet composition and central bank operations, but this listing page provides no such information.

issues_found: PAGE_TYPE is listing_page per source diagnostics - non-archiveable content

Source name incorrectly set to 'macro catalysts' instead of institution name

Underlying data files may be relevant but this page is just an index

human_review.notes: Source is a low-value listing page containing only a publication calendar. No macro catalyst or market structure content present. Recommend either archiving the underlying data files directly or dismissing this listing page from the archive as it provides no research value on its own.
